# Synthetic TrueNAS 26 fixtures

Every `.eml` file in this directory is hand-written, anonymized, and marked
with `X-Synthetic-Fixture: true`. The messages approximate the public TrueNAS
middleware alert-service layout; they are not copied from a private appliance.

Names, domains, pool labels, and other identifiers use synthetic or reserved
values. A real TrueNAS 26 replay remains the compatibility authority.
